columns.name: Org
columns.description: The GitHub organization associated with the audit log event.

columns.name: Action
columns.description: The name of the action that was performed, for example user.login or repo.create.

columns.name: Repo
columns.description: The name of the repository associated with the event.

columns.name: Actor
columns.description: The actor who performed the action.

columns.name: CountryCode
columns.description: The country code from the actor's location.

columns.name: User
columns.description: The user that was affected by the action performed.

columns.name: Permission
columns.description: The permission level granted or associated with the action.

columns.name: Visibility
columns.description: The repository visibility, for example public or private.

columns.name: PreviousVisibility
columns.description: The previous repository visibility before the change.

columns.name: OldPermission
columns.description: The previous permission level before the change.

columns.name: Team
columns.description: The team associated with the audit log event.

columns.name: BlockedUser
columns.description: The username of the account being blocked.

columns.name: OperationType
columns.description: The type of operation performed, for example create, modify, or delete.

columns.name: PublicRepo
columns.description: Whether the repository is public.

columns.name: OrgId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the GitHub organization.

columns.name: CreatedAt
columns.description: The time the audit log event was recorded, given as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

columns.name: InviteeEmail
columns.description: The email address of the person invited.

columns.name: ActorIp
columns.description: The IP address of the actor who performed the action.

columns.name: ActorId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the actor who performed the action.

columns.name: ActorIsBot
columns.description: Whether the actor is a bot account.

columns.name: BusinessId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the GitHub Enterprise business.

columns.name: RepoId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the repository.

columns.name: UserAgent
columns.description: The user agent string of the client that initiated the action.

columns.name: UserId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the affected user.

columns.name: Email
columns.description: The email address associated with the event.

columns.name: RepositorySecurityConfigurationFailureReason
columns.description: The reason a repository security configuration failed to apply.

columns.name: RepositorySecurityConfigurationState
columns.description: The state of the repository security configuration.

columns.name: SecurityConfigurationName
columns.description: The name of the security configuration.

columns.name: OauthApplication
columns.description: The name of the OAuth application involved in the event.

columns.name: OauthApplicationUrl
columns.description: The URL of the OAuth application.

columns.name: OauthApplicationState
columns.description: The state of the OAuth application.

columns.name: Reason
columns.description: The reason for the action or event.

columns.name: MembershipType
columns.description: The type of membership, for example admin or member.

columns.name: UserCanInviteCollaborators
columns.description: Whether the user has permission to invite collaborators.

columns.name: CanCreateRepositories
columns.description: Whether the user has permission to create repositories.

columns.name: SecurityConfigurationId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the security configuration.

columns.name: InvitationId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the invitation.

columns.name: Topic
columns.description: The topic associated with the event.

columns.name: DocumentId
columns.description: A unique identifier for the audit event.

columns.name: Business
columns.description: The name of the GitHub Enterprise business.

columns.name: RequestCategory
columns.description: The category of the request.

columns.name: OauthApplicationId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the OAuth application.

columns.name: OldRepoPermission
columns.description: The previous repository permission before the change.

columns.name: NewRepoPermission
columns.description: The new repository permission after the change.

columns.name: RepositoriesRemovedNames
columns.description: The names of repositories that were removed.

columns.name: Active
columns.description: Whether the resource is currently active.

columns.name: ActiveWas
columns.description: Whether the resource was previously active.

columns.name: Data
columns.description: Additional data associated with the event, serialized as a JSON string.

columns.name: Config
columns.description: The current configuration associated with the event, serialized as a JSON string.

columns.name: ConfigWas
columns.description: The previous configuration before the change, serialized as a JSON string.

columns.name: ContentType
columns.description: The content type of the resource.

columns.name: DeployKeyFingerprint
columns.description: The fingerprint of the deploy key.

columns.name: Emoji
columns.description: The emoji associated with the event.

columns.name: Events
columns.description: The current events configuration, serialized as a JSON string.

columns.name: EventsWere
columns.description: The previous events configuration before the change, serialized as a JSON string.

columns.name: Explanation
columns.description: An explanation or additional context for the event.

columns.name: Fingerprint
columns.description: The fingerprint of the key or certificate.

columns.name: HookId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the webhook.

columns.name: LimitedAvailability
columns.description: Whether the feature has limited availability.

columns.name: Message
columns.description: A message associated with the event.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: The name of the resource associated with the event.

columns.name: OldUser
columns.description: The previous user before the change.

columns.name: OpensshPublicKey
columns.description: The OpenSSH public key associated with the event.

columns.name: ReadOnly
columns.description: Whether the resource is read-only.

columns.name: TargetLogin
columns.description: The login of the target user.

columns.name: TransportProtocol
columns.description: The type of protocol (for example, HTTP or SSH) used to transfer Git data.

columns.name: TransportProtocolName
columns.description: A human readable name for the protocol used to transfer Git data.

columns.name: StartedAt
columns.description: The time the workflow or job started.

columns.name: CompletedAt
columns.description: The time the workflow or job completed.

columns.name: Conclusion
columns.description: The conclusion status of the workflow run, for example success or failure.

columns.name: Event
columns.description: The event that triggered the workflow.

columns.name: HeadBranch
columns.description: The head branch of the workflow run.

columns.name: HeadSha
columns.description: The HEAD SHA of the commit that triggered the workflow.

columns.name: RunAttempt
columns.description: The attempt number of the workflow run.

columns.name: RunNumber
columns.description: The run number of the workflow.

columns.name: TriggerId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the trigger.

columns.name: WorkflowId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the workflow.

columns.name: WorkflowRunId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the workflow run.

columns.name: EnvironmentName
columns.description: The name of the deployment environment.

columns.name: IsHostedRunner
columns.description: Whether the runner is a GitHub-hosted runner.

columns.name: JobName
columns.description: The name of the workflow job.

columns.name: JobWorkflowRef
columns.description: The reference to the reusable workflow used by the job.

columns.name: RunnerGroupId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the runner group.

columns.name: RunnerGroupName
columns.description: The name of the runner group.

columns.name: RunnerId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the runner.

columns.name: RunnerLabels
columns.description: The labels assigned to the runner.

columns.name: RunnerName
columns.description: The name of the runner.

columns.name: SecretsPassed
columns.description: The secrets passed to the workflow or job.

columns.name: HashedToken
columns.description: The hashed token used for authentication.

columns.name: ProgrammaticAccessType
columns.description: The type of programmatic access used.

columns.name: RequestAccessSecurityHeader
columns.description: The security header of the access request.

columns.name: TokenId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the token.

columns.name: PullRequestId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the pull request.

columns.name: PullRequestTitle
columns.description: The title of the pull request.

columns.name: PullRequestUrl
columns.description: The URL of the pull request.

columns.name: OldRolePermissions
columns.description: The previous role permissions before the change.

columns.name: RolePermissions
columns.description: The current role permissions.

columns.name: RequestId
columns.description: The unique identifier of the request.

columns.name: BaseRole
columns.description: The base role for the organization or repository.

columns.name: CustomPattern
columns.description: The custom secret scanning pattern.

columns.name: Source
columns.description: The source of the event.

columns.name: ActivityType
columns.description: The type of activity that was performed.

columns.name: GhsaId
columns.description: The GitHub Security Advisory identifier.

columns.name: Recipient
columns.description: The recipient of the action.

columns.name: RunnerOwnerType
columns.description: The type of the runner owner, for example organization or enterprise.

columns.name: OrganizationRoleId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the organization role.

columns.name: OrganizationRoleName
columns.description: The name of the organization role.

columns.name: Owner
columns.description: The owner of the resource.

columns.name: OldTokenExpiration
columns.description: The previous token expiration timestamp.

columns.name: ExemptAdministrators
columns.description: Whether administrators are exempt from the rule.

columns.name: TokenExpiration
columns.description: The token expiration timestamp.

columns.name: Policy
columns.description: The policy associated with the event.

columns.name: ApplicationClientId
columns.description: The client ID of the application.

columns.name: Integration
columns.description: The integration associated with the event.

columns.name: RepositoriesRemoved
columns.description: The repositories removed from the integration or configuration.

columns.name: RepositorySelection
columns.description: The repository selection mode, for example all or selected.

columns.name: NewProjectBaseRole
columns.description: The new base role for the project.

columns.name: OldProjectBaseRole
columns.description: The previous base role for the project.

columns.name: ProjectId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the project.

columns.name: ProjectNumber
columns.description: The project number.

columns.name: PublicProject
columns.description: Whether the project is public.

columns.name: RulesetBypassActors
columns.description: The actors that can bypass the ruleset.

columns.name: RulesetConditions
columns.description: The conditions of the ruleset.

columns.name: RulesetEnforcement
columns.description: The enforcement level of the ruleset.

columns.name: RulesetId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the ruleset.

columns.name: RulesetName
columns.description: The name of the ruleset.

columns.name: RulesetRules
columns.description: The rules defined in the ruleset.

columns.name: RulesetSourceType
columns.description: The source type of the ruleset, for example organization or repository.

columns.name: RulesetRulesDeleted
columns.description: The rules deleted from the ruleset.

columns.name: RulesetConditionsUpdated
columns.description: The updated conditions of the ruleset.

columns.name: AdminEnforced
columns.description: Whether the branch protection rule is enforced for administrators.

columns.name: AllowDeletionsEnforcementLevel
columns.description: The enforcement level for allowing branch deletions.

columns.name: AllowForcePushesEnforcementLevel
columns.description: The enforcement level for allowing force pushes.

columns.name: AuthorizedActorNames
columns.description: The names of actors authorized to bypass branch protection.

columns.name: CreateProtected
columns.description: Whether branch creation is protected.

columns.name: DismissStaleReviewsOnPush
columns.description: Whether stale pull request reviews are dismissed on new pushes.

columns.name: EnforcementLevel
columns.description: The enforcement level of the protection rule.

columns.name: IgnoreApprovalsFromContributors
columns.description: Whether approvals from contributors are ignored.

columns.name: LinearHistoryRequirementEnforcementLevel
columns.description: The enforcement level for requiring linear commit history.

columns.name: LockAllowsFetchAndMerge
columns.description: Whether locked branches allow fetch and merge.

columns.name: LockBranchEnforcementLevel
columns.description: The enforcement level for branch locking.

columns.name: MergeQueueEnforcementLevel
columns.description: The enforcement level for merge queue.

columns.name: PullRequestReviewsEnforcementLevel
columns.description: The enforcement level for pull request reviews.

columns.name: RequireCodeOwnerReview
columns.description: Whether code owner review is required.

columns.name: RequireLastPushApproval
columns.description: Whether approval from someone other than the last pusher is required.

columns.name: RequiredApprovingReviewCount
columns.description: The number of required approving reviews.

columns.name: RequiredDeploymentsEnforcementLevel
columns.description: The enforcement level for required deployments.

columns.name: RequiredReviewThreadResolutionEnforcementLevel
columns.description: The enforcement level for required review thread resolution.

columns.name: RequiredStatusChecksEnforcementLevel
columns.description: The enforcement level for required status checks.

columns.name: SignatureRequirementEnforcementLevel
columns.description: The enforcement level for commit signature requirements.

columns.name: StrictRequiredStatusChecksPolicy
columns.description: Whether strict required status checks policy is enabled.

columns.name: AllowedValues
columns.description: The allowed values for a custom property.

columns.name: DefaultValue
columns.description: The default value for a custom property.

columns.name: DefinitionId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the custom property definition.

columns.name: Description
columns.description: The description of the resource or event.

columns.name: PropertyName
columns.description: The name of the custom property.

columns.name: ValueType
columns.description: The data type of the custom property value.

columns.name: ValuesEditableBy
columns.description: Who can edit the custom property values.

columns.name: OldValuesEditableBy
columns.description: Who could previously edit the custom property values.

columns.name: OldDefaultValue
columns.description: The previous default value for a custom property.

columns.name: OldRequired
columns.description: Whether the custom property was previously required.

columns.name: Required
columns.description: Whether the custom property is required.

columns.name: Enablement
columns.description: The enablement state of a feature or configuration.

columns.name: OwnerType
columns.description: The type of the owner, for example user or organization.

columns.name: CommitId
columns.description: The commit identifier associated with the event.

columns.name: RuleSuiteId
columns.description: The numeric identifier of the rule suite evaluation.

columns.name: Referrer
columns.description: The referrer URL or source.

columns.name: Reasons
columns.description: The reasons for the action or decision.

columns.name: OverriddenCodes
columns.description: The codes that were overridden.

columns.name: After
columns.description: The state after the change.

columns.name: Before
columns.description: The state before the change.

columns.name: Branch
columns.description: The branch associated with the event.

columns.name: IssueTypeName
columns.description: The name of the issue type.

columns.name: OldDescription
columns.description: The previous description before the change.

columns.name: OldEnabled
columns.description: Whether the feature was previously enabled.

columns.name: OldIssueTypeName
columns.description: The previous issue type name before the change.

columns.name: NewAccess
columns.description: The new access level after the change.

columns.name: OldAccess
columns.description: The previous access level before the change.

columns.name: UpdatedAllowedTypes
columns.description: Whether the allowed types were updated.

columns.name: NewPolicy
columns.description: The new policy after the change.

columns.name: NewRepoRunnersPolicy
columns.description: The new repository runners policy after the change.

columns.name: OldRepoRunnersPolicy
columns.description: The previous repository runners policy.

columns.name: Limit
columns.description: The limit value associated with the event.

columns.name: RunnerGroupRestrictedToWorkflows
columns.description: Whether the runner group is restricted to specific workflows.

columns.name: RunnerGroupSelectedWorkflowRefs

columns.name: RunnerGroupAllowPublic
columns.description: Whether the runner group allows public repositories.

columns.name: IpAllowListEntry
columns.description: The IP allow list entry.

columns.name: TwoFactorMethod
columns.description: The two-factor authentication method used.

columns.name: AlertNumbers
columns.description: The alert numbers associated with the event.

columns.name: CommitOid
columns.description: The commit object identifier (OID).

columns.name: Ref
columns.description: The Git reference associated with the event.

columns.name: DefaultForNewPublicRepos
columns.description: Whether the configuration is the default for new public repositories.

columns.name: DomainName

columns.name: Key
